# A Modern Alternative to SFMC

Stop waiting on IT tickets and manual data extensions. Join brands like Stanley Black & Decker and SecretEscapes who traded SFMC’s complexity for agility, real-time data, and faster time-to-value.

## Why Enterprise Brands Switch from SFMC to Iterable

### Ditch Engineering Dependencies

SFMC requires technical support for simple tasks. Iterable puts campaign creation, journeys, and personalization in marketers’ hands—no SQL, no AMPscript, no tickets.

### Act on Real-Time Data

Say goodbye to nightly syncs. Ingest and activate behavioral signals in real-time, so you reach customers at the moment they’re ready to act.

### Predictable Pricing

One platform, one contract. No hidden AI licenses or consultant fees.

## Quick Comparison

Iterable VS. Salesforce Marketing Cloud

### Iterable

AI Cross-Channel Communication Platform

Iterable is the AI-powered customer communications platform that empowers brands like Redfin, Priceline, Calm, and Box create joyful, personalized customer experiences at scale. With Iterable, organizations unlock growth in the digital era with individualized, harmonized and dynamic communications that engage customers throughout the entire lifecycle at the right time.

### Salesforce Marketing Cloud

Legacy Marketing Platform

Salesforce Marketing Cloud is a legacy suite of disparate tools that often require specialized technical teams to execute basic campaigns. While it offers a broad feature set, its fragmented data architecture creates significant latency, preventing brands from acting on customer behavior in real-time. For the modern marketer, it represents a high-cost, high-friction ecosystem that prioritizes enterprise complexity over agile, cross-channel execution.
